And those are without bundled controllers, which drive up the cost more. The prices are so high in part because Valve isn't subsidizing the hardware , and the company has already indicated that the component crisis forced it to reconsider its initial pricing plans . In an interview with the YouTube channel Gamers Nexus, Valve engineers discussed the reality of sourcing RAM in 2026, with take-it-or-leave-it prices as memory and other components remain in short supply, from only a few vendors like Samsung, Micron, and SK Hyni … Read the full story at The Verge. ]]> Gaby Del Valle https://www.theverge.com/?p=953888 2026-06-22T15:52:26-04:00 2026-06-22T16:00:00-04:00 Joyce, a native New Yorker, didn't think finding her first solo apartment in the city would be easy. But she also didn't think it'd be "hell." After looking at a lot of tiny, overpriced places she described as "shitholes," Joyce found her dream apartment: a reasonably priced studio in Manhattan. "It was big and airy, and there was a fireplace," she said. The kitchen was small but well equipped and looked like it had been recently renovated. She dropped everything to see the apartment, and when she got there, she learned that five other women, all around her age, had viewings scheduled after hers. "I get in, and it's not the same apartment … Read the full story at The Verge. ]]> Victoria Song https://www.theverge.com/?p=953458 2026-06-22T12:24:12-04:00 2026-06-22T14:00:00-04:00 The Apple Watch SE 3 is at an all-time low of $199, making the sleeper hit of last year’s Apple Watches an even better value. They can't afford big marketing agencies. They don't have time to learn new tools. And most of the technology being built isn't being built for them.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Here's the thing: small business owners aren't sitting around clicking ads looking for solutions. They're heads-down running their businesses. In return, we'll put you on the front lines of one of the most important technology shifts of our lifetime, teach you everything you need to know, and pay you very well to do it.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em">This is your chance to be part of the AI revolution â not by staring at a screen, but by walking into your community and making a real difference for real people.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2><strong>What youâll do</strong></h2><p style="min-height:1.5em">You'll be the face of Omada in your area â connect with local businesses, starting conversations, and showing owners how our AI platform can handle their marketing while they focus on running their business.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em">You probably already know places like these. Your trials are your leads</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Use our CRM HubSpot to track, follow up, follow up, follow up, and close</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">When they convert to a paid subscription, you earn $200</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em">Most of our Territory Partners close their first trial within the first week, and 3+ per week after that.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2><strong>Where this can take you</strong></h2><p style="min-height:1.5em">We're building something big â and we promote from within. Top Territory Partners can move into team lead, city manager, and regional roles as we grow. If you want to build a real career at the intersection of AI and sales, this is where it starts.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2><strong>Requirements</strong></h2><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Hungry, self-motivated, and comfortable walking into a room</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Genuinely excited about AI and what it can do for small businesses</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Strong communicator who connects with people quickly</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">No prior sales experience required â we'll teach you everything</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Must reside in the United States</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Must be 18 years of age or older</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Bonus: sales experience; experience working with small business owners</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2><strong>This role is well-suited for</strong></h2><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Hunter sales reps who can develop their own book of business and want to earn uncapped commissions and a short sale cycle</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">College grads or students who want to build sales skills and make real money</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Anyone tired of pure commission work but still wants serious upside</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2><strong>About </strong><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="http://Omada.ai"><strong>Omada.ai</strong></a></h2><p style="min-height:1.5em">Omada is on a mission to help Main Street and local high streets win. newContent: Remote OK Director of Credit Risk Made Card <h1>About the Company</h1><p style="min-height:1.5em">Madeâs mission is to help homeowners save time, money, and stress. It starts with <strong>Made Card</strong> - a credit card designed specifically for homeowners, with unmatched rewards on mortgage payments, home improvements, utilities, and essential purchases. By bringing together financial tools, data, and trusted professionals, we give people more control, more savings, and more time to enjoy the place they call home.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Weâre partnered with <strong>leading national players in the residential homeownership space</strong> - from mortgage lenders to home services providers - embedding Made into the key moments of the homeowner journey. These partnerships let us reach millions of households across the country and deliver meaningful benefits to homeowners.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Backed by top investors like <strong>Village Global, Jump Capital, Recharge Capital, </strong>and <strong>Soma Capital</strong>, our leadership team brings deep fintech, mortgage, and credit card experience from <strong>Ramp, Bain Capital, JP Morgan Chase, American Express, </strong>and <strong>Morgan Stanley</strong>. Weâre building the financial and engagement platform for the next generation of homeowners - one that puts the homeowner at the center, and redefines what it means to feel at home.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h1><strong>About the Role</strong></h1><p style="min-height:1.5em">The <strong>Director of Credit Risk</strong> will play a critical role in shaping and leading Made Cardâs credit risk strategy across the customer lifecycle. Youâll drive underwriting, pricing, segmentation, and decisioning for our credit card product while overseeing performance of the credit portfolio.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">This role also owns the development and tracking of credit models and will lead Made Cardâs Decision Science practice.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h1><strong>What Youâll Do</strong></h1><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Underwriting &amp; New Accounts: Define and optimize credit strategies for new account approvals, ensuring robust risk controls while enabling growth. Deploy test and learn mechanisms. Have complete ownership of implementation of said strategies directly in the risk decision engine.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Credit Policy &amp; Segmentation: Develop, refine, and monitor credit policies and customer segmentation strategies to enhance risk differentiation.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Pricing &amp; Limits: Design pricing and credit limit frameworks to maximize risk-adjusted returns. Implement ongoing pricing and limit management strategies (penalty pricing, limit increases, reductions etc.)</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Model Decisioning: Build, own, and continuously improve credit risk models, decision thresholds, and cutoffs.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Portfolio Performance: Develop and monitor KPIs, analyze trends, and deliver actionable insights to maintain portfolio quality and profitability.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Collections Strategy: Develop data-driven, customer-focused strategies that reduce delinquencies and charge-offs.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Risk operations: Conduct manual reviews (underwriting, limit increases etc.), document exceptions, handle credit bureau disputes, set up payment plans.</p></li></ul><h1><br /><strong>Ideal Background</strong></h1><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">2+ years of experience in consumer lending or credit risk, with a proven track record in fintech environments.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Strong experience in at least one dimension of the credit lifecycle: underwriting, pricing, portfolio management, and collections</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Hands-on experience with credit risk models and credit bureau data (traditional and alternative).</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Strong technical acumen: pull data, analyze, create KPIs, create reporting tools (Python, SQL knowledge a plus)</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Ability to synthesize complex data into clear strategies and communicate them to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em"><em>We understand that not everyone comes from a traditional background. If you are a rockstar with a non-traditional path, we'd love to talk to you!</em></p><h1><br /><strong>Nice to Have</strong></h1><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Experience in fintech, credit cards, real estate, or home services.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Familiarity with compliance-heavy or regulated marketing environments.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Passion for credit cards, rewards, or homeownership-related products.</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h1><strong>Benefits</strong></h1><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Base Compensation Band:</strong> $100,000â$110,000 (determined by experience, qualifications, and location)</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Compensation:</strong> Competitive salary with a meaningful stake in the company via equity</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Health &amp; Well-being:</strong> Weâll invest in your physical and mental well-being with comprehensive medical, dental, &amp; vision benefits</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Grow Together:</strong> Company-wide orientation for you to successfully onboard and other learning &amp; development opportunities including regular review cycles that feature 360 degree feedback</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Mortgage Benefit:</strong> Receive up to $25,000 toward closing costs of a new mortgage via our mortgage partners</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Play Together:</strong> Quarterly budgets for team and company outings. oldContent: Remote OK Director of Credit Risk Made Card <h1>About the Company</h1><p style="min-height:1.5em">Madeâs mission is to help homeowners save time, money, and stress. It starts with <strong>Made Card</strong> - a credit card designed specifically for homeowners, with unmatched rewards on mortgage payments, home improvements, utilities, and essential purchases. Each swipe powers a personalized home management platform where users can manage home systems &amp; appliances, stay ahead on upkeep, and get help - from AI-driven guidance to in-person services - exactly when they need it most. By bringing together financial tools, data, and trusted professionals, we give people more control, more savings, and more time to enjoy the place they call home.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Weâre partnered with <strong>leading national players in the residential homeownership space</strong> - from mortgage lenders to home services providers - embedding Made into the key moments of the homeowner journey. These partnerships let us reach millions of households across the country and deliver meaningful benefits to homeowners.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Backed by top investors like <strong>Village Global, Jump Capital, Recharge Capital, </strong>and <strong>Soma Capital</strong>, our leadership team brings deep fintech, mortgage, and credit card experience from <strong>Ramp, Bain Capital, JP Morgan Chase, American Express, </strong>and <strong>Morgan Stanley</strong>. Weâre building the financial and engagement platform for the next generation of homeowners - one that puts the homeowner at the center, and redefines what it means to feel at home.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h1><strong>About the Role</strong></h1><p style="min-height:1.5em">The <strong>Director of Credit Risk</strong> will play a critical role in shaping and leading Made Cardâs credit risk strategy across the customer lifecycle. Youâll drive underwriting, pricing, segmentation, and decisioning for our credit card product while overseeing performance of the credit portfolio.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">This role also owns the development and tracking of credit models and will lead Made Cardâs Decision Science practice.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h1><strong>What Youâll Do</strong></h1><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Underwriting &amp; New Accounts: Define and optimize credit strategies for new account approvals, ensuring robust risk controls while enabling growth. Deploy test and learn mechanisms. Have complete ownership of implementation of said strategies directly in the risk decision engine.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Credit Policy &amp; Segmentation: Develop, refine, and monitor credit policies and customer segmentation strategies to enhance risk differentiation.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Pricing &amp; Limits: Design pricing and credit limit frameworks to maximize risk-adjusted returns. Implement ongoing pricing and limit management strategies (penalty pricing, limit increases, reductions etc.)</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Model Decisioning: Build, own, and continuously improve credit risk models, decision thresholds, and cutoffs.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Portfolio Performance: Develop and monitor KPIs, analyze trends, and deliver actionable insights to maintain portfolio quality and profitability.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Collections Strategy: Develop data-driven, customer-focused strategies that reduce delinquencies and charge-offs.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Risk operations: Conduct manual reviews (underwriting, limit increases etc.), document exceptions, handle credit bureau disputes, set up payment plans.</p></li></ul><h1><br /><strong>Ideal Background</strong></h1><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">2+ years of experience in consumer lending or credit risk, with a proven track record in fintech environments.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Strong experience in at least one dimension of the credit lifecycle: underwriting, pricing, portfolio management, and collections</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Hands-on experience with credit risk models and credit bureau data (traditional and alternative).</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Strong technical acumen: pull data, analyze, create KPIs, create reporting tools (Python, SQL knowledge a plus)</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Ability to synthesize complex data into clear strategies and communicate them to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em"><em>We understand that not everyone comes from a traditional background. If you are a rockstar with a non-traditional path, we'd love to talk to you!</em></p><h1><br /><strong>Nice to Have</strong></h1><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Experience in fintech, credit cards, real estate, or home services.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Familiarity with compliance-heavy or regulated marketing environments.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Passion for credit cards, rewards, or homeownership-related products.</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h1><strong>Benefits</strong></h1><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Base Compensation Band:</strong> $100,000â$110,000 (determined by experience, qualifications, and location)</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Compensation:</strong> Competitive salary with a meaningful stake in the company via equity</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Health &amp; Well-being:</strong> Weâll invest in your physical and mental well-being with comprehensive medical, dental, &amp; vision benefits</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Grow Together:</strong> Company-wide orientation for you to successfully onboard and other learning &amp; development opportunities including regular review cycles that feature 360 degree feedback</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Mortgage Benefit:</strong> Receive up to $25,000 toward closing costs of a new mortgage via our mortgage partners</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Play Together:</strong> Quarterly budgets for team and company outings. Use it for team swag, cooking classes, or team dinners!</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Generous Time Off:</strong> Flexible paid time off, sick days, and 11 company holidays</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em"><br /><em&
